description: Remove PlanCause and causes from Plan domain + PlanService
steps: Delete `PlanCause` schema and type from `packages/domain/src/Plan.ts`
Remove `causes` field from `PlanFileEntry`, `PlanDirectoryEntry`, `PlanTreeFileNode`, `PlanTreeDirectoryNode`
Delete all cause conversion functions: `toPlanTargetCauses`, `toPlanTargetModuleCauses`, `toPlanRepoModuleCauses`, `toPlanTargetCompositionCauses`, `mergePlanCauses`, `isBlueprintCauseSelected`
Delete cause sorting helpers: `sortPlanCauses`
Remove `causes` from all `Projected*` types and `appendProjected*` helpers in `PlanService.ts`
Remove `planCauseOrd` and `toPlanCauseKey` from `Order.ts`
Update `Plan.test.ts` — remove all cause assertions and cause-dependent test data
Update `PlanService.test.ts` — remove cause assertions from entry/directory checks
`bun test --filter=domain && bun test --filter=scaffold && bun lint` passes

description: Remove PlanWarning and merge warnings into PlanConflict
steps: Delete `PlanWarning` schema from `packages/domain/src/Plan.ts`
Remove `warnings` field from `Plan`
Rename `MergeRequirement` to `PlanConflict` and remove `causes` from all 6 variants
Replace `mergeRequirements` + `warnings` with single `conflicts: Array<PlanConflict>` field on Plan
Update `prettyPrint()` and `toSorted()` to use `conflicts` instead of separate merge/warning lists
Remove all `create*Warning` functions from `PlanService.ts`
Remove `planWarningOrd` from `Order.ts`
Update `Plan.test.ts` — replace warning/mergeRequirement assertions with conflict assertions
Update `PlanService.test.ts` — replace warning assertions with conflict assertions
`bun test --filter=domain && bun test --filter=scaffold && bun lint` passes
blockedBy: Remove PlanCause and causes from Plan domain + PlanService

description: Remove BlueprintCause, BlueprintStatus, and causes from Blueprint domain + BlueprintService
steps: Delete `BlueprintCause` and `BlueprintStatus` schemas from `packages/domain/src/Blueprint.ts`
Remove `causes` and `status` fields from `ResolvedTarget`, `ResolvedTargetModule`, `ResolvedRepoModule`
Add `roots: Array<string>` field to `Blueprint` (node IDs from user Selection)
Remove cause-related mutable state from BlueprintService: `MutableTargetState.causes`, `MutableTargetModuleState.causes`, `MutableRepoModuleState.causes`
Remove `appendCause`, `toSelectionCause`, `toDependencyCause`, `toCauseKey` helpers from BlueprintService
Remove cause threading from `ensureTarget`, `ensureRepoModule`, `ensureTargetModule`
Populate `roots` from selection input in BlueprintService.resolve
Remove `blueprintCauseOrd` from `Order.ts`
Update `Blueprint.test.ts` — remove cause assertions, add root assertions
Update `BlueprintService.test.ts` — remove cause assertions, add root assertions
`bun test --filter=domain && bun test --filter=scaffold && bun lint` passes
blockedBy: Remove PlanCause and causes from Plan domain + PlanService

description: Remove BlueprintWarning from Blueprint domain + BlueprintService
steps: Delete `BlueprintWarning` schema from `packages/domain/src/Blueprint.ts`
Remove `warnings` field from `Blueprint`
Delete `buildWarnings` and `toRedundantSelectionWarning` from `BlueprintService.ts`
Remove `blueprintWarningOrd` from `Order.ts`
Update `prettyPrint()` to remove warnings section
Remove `hasWarnings()` method from Blueprint
Update `Blueprint.test.ts` — remove warning assertions and warning test data
Update `BlueprintService.test.ts` — remove 'when selected nodes are also implied' describe block
`bun test --filter=domain && bun test --filter=scaffold && bun lint` passes
blockedBy: Remove BlueprintCause, BlueprintStatus, and causes from Blueprint domain + BlueprintService

description: Flatten Blueprint to BlueprintNode + BlueprintEdge graph structure
steps: Replace `BlueprintNodeReference` union with string node IDs on edges
Flatten `ResolvedTarget` + `ResolvedTargetModule` + `ResolvedRepoModule` into a `BlueprintNode` tagged union (target, target-module, repo-module)
Simplify `BlueprintDependencyEdge` to `BlueprintEdge` with string `from`/`to` fields
Remove `toBlueprintNodeReferenceKey` and `blueprintNodeReferenceOrd` from `Order.ts`
Update `prettyPrint()` to render from the new node/edge structure
Update Blueprint helper methods (`hasTarget`, `getTarget`, `getSelectedTargets`, `getImpliedTargets`) to work with new structure
Update PlanService to consume new Blueprint shape (walk `BlueprintNode` instead of `ResolvedTarget`)
Update `Blueprint.test.ts` with new node/edge shapes
Update `BlueprintService.test.ts` with new node/edge shapes
Update `PlanService.test.ts` blueprint fixtures to use new shape
`bun test --filter=domain && bun test --filter=scaffold && bun lint` passes
blockedBy: Remove BlueprintCause, BlueprintStatus, and causes from Blueprint domain + BlueprintService
Remove BlueprintWarning from Blueprint domain + BlueprintService
